config.title: Basic Configuration
config.subtitle: How will you access Oikos?
config.existing: Existing configuration detected — your current .env file will be backed up before saving.
config.hostHint: The address you'll use to open Oikos in your browser.
config.errHost: Invalid hostname. Use only letters, digits, hyphens and dots.
config.errPort: Invalid port. Must be a number between 1 and 65535.

secrets.title: Security Keys
secrets.subtitle: These protect your session and encrypt the database. Store your .env file safely — losing these keys means losing access to your data.
secrets.dbHint: Encrypts the SQLite database at rest.

weather.title: Weather Widget
weather.subtitle: Show live weather on your dashboard. Requires a free OpenWeatherMap API key.
weather.errKey: API key is required when weather is enabled.

calendar.title: Calendar Sync
calendar.subtitle: Connect Oikos to Google Calendar or Apple iCloud. Both optional — expand to configure.
calendar.googleHint: Create OAuth credentials at {{link}}. Redirect URI: {{redirect}}

review.title: Review
review.subtitle: Check your settings before writing .env and starting the container.

docker.title: Starting Oikos
docker.subtitle: Pulling the image and starting the Docker container.

admin.title: Create Admin Account
admin.subtitle: Set up your first login. This account has full access to Oikos.
admin.errPass: Password must be at least 8 characters.

done.title: Oikos is ready!
done.subtitle: Your family planner is running and your admin account is set up.
